meaning: n.犹太高等学校,犹太初等(或中学)学校
examples: It is part of Yeshiva University.
What choice?... the last thing I took away from the yeshiva is this... we can't run from who we are. Our destiny chooses us.
Researchers at the Albert Einstein College of Medicine of Yeshiva University in New York recently reported the latest findings.
Shilo has grown to 250 families, and the settlement now has its own yeshiva, or rabbinical training institute.
Paratroopers from kibbutzim danced with yeshiva buchers as they stood in awe before the remnant of the Second Temple.
